_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: Using cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM), we determined the 3.6 Å resolution structure of the 2818 amino acid isoform I
details: Successfully used for cryo-EM structure determination of neurofibromin at 3.6 Å resolution
